parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gda_error_log (
  workflow_name,
  workflow_id,
  error_message,
  error_node,
  execution_id,
  logged_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ ($json.workflow_name || $json.workflow?.name || "unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.workflow_id || $json.workflow?.id || "unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.error_message || $json.error?.message || $json.message || "unknown error").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.error_node || $json.node?.name || "unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.execution_id || $json.execution?.id || "unknown").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
)
